bio: Pixie was first seen in December 2024. She was very cautious at first and took some time to gain our trust. In September 2025, she spent a short period indoors recovering from a small abscess, which showed us she would do well in a loving home. She’s now settled around Nola by the outdoor gym and gets along well with the other cats in the area.
location: In the park by the Outside Gym by Nola, Cluster P.
